title: datareps.json schema
description: Schema for the datareps.json output produced by datarepgen.py. Contains an array of scenes, each scene being an array of data representation objects.

type.description: Shape or panel type. Lowercase types (sphere, box, cylinder, arc, text, etc.) are scene-level data reps. Uppercase or panel types (xy, -xy, xz, zy, lc=_, etc.) are stage-level panels.

color.description: Hex colour of the data rep.

asset.description: Path/URL to an asset (e.g. encoding JSON, panel PNG) or an inline descriptor (e.g. arc parameters, text label).
